{{Entity Class|Hab=[[Level 0]] and its sublevels|Dan=5|Int=3|Agg=5|no=?}} == Description == {{Blurimage|file=Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly.png|hovertext=Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly|caption=A picture of Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly.}} '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''', sporting the scientific name ''Piscis ignominiae'', is an extremely dangerous, individual anomalous entity primarily found in the darker regions of [[Level 0]] and, on rarer occasions, in its sublevels. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' is well-known for its unusual methods of hunting. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' has emerged as a niche meme in online communities like [[Backchat (Collaborative Log)|Backchat]], [[Extended BACK-NET Website List|Backvideo, FBF, and Backblog]], with many users joking about how absurd the entity is. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' is virtually invincible, surviving gunshot wounds, fires, extreme temperatures, and other amenities like they are nothing. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' can float at a maximum between 300 and 1000 miles per hour, making it nearly undetectable to the naked eye on most occasions. Notably, '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''''s hearing and sight are heightened. It can hear the quietest sound from tens of meters away, and its sight is as excellent as that of an eagle. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' does not follow the natural laws of physics, most noticeably by floating in mid-air with no reasonable explanation, and its ungodly speed compared to other life forms in [[Backrooms Wiki|the Backrooms]]. == Biology == {{Blurimage|file=Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly 2.png|hovertext=Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly 2|caption=Another picture of Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly.|align=left}} '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' takes the appearance of a dark, putrid goldfish corpse that floats around. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' has also been observed to contain a dark aura that constantly surrounds it. This aura destroys any sources of both natural and artificial light wherever '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' goes, leaving the area in total darkness. Surprisingly enough, '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' is able to speak fluently in every known language. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' has a characteristic rotting stench that smells nothing like anything in its habitat. If one smells it, the best they can do is very silently walk back the way they came from. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' can also be perceived by the noise of its movement, although on most occasions it is too late once the noise is heard. Currently, it is believed that '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''''s main diet consists of humans, based on its hunting method. However, it's not known how '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' consumes its nourishment and eliminates waste. As a fish-like creature, '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' would likely not have the systems necessary to consume or dispose of large-scale nourishment like humans, leaving researchers confused. == Behavior == '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' most typically floats around its habitat doing absolutely nothing. If it finds someone, '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' will rapidly approach and bodyshame that person until they see [[Phenomenon 25|Hangman's Noose]]. On some occasions, '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' will observe the person for a certain period before body-shaming them. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' will insist on consistently following and bodyshaming the person for as long as they don't see [[Phenomenon 25|Hangman's Noose]]. Once the person sees [[Phenomenon 25|Hangman's Noose]], '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' will leave them alone and seek another victim. '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' will eventually search for the victim's body 1 year later to eat. Although, sometimes the body is no longer in [[Level 0]], which would explain why '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' can also be found in [[Level 0]]'s sublevels. This could also imply that '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' can survive for prolonged periods of time without food. == Discovery == {{Blurimage|file=It was dead fish that floats around and calls you ugly all along.webp|hovertext=it heard you!!!!!!!!! scary!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!|caption=Post believed to mention Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly.}}It is not widely known how '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' was discovered. However, logs around [[Phenomenon 2|BACK-NET]] mentioning creatures like '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' date back to as far as the 90's. Each post has very different and conflicting stories, but most of these can be made out as discussing '''Dead Fish That Floats Around And Calls You Ugly''' in some form.
